translations.*第一次充電可能需要較長時間\n*前幾天電池效能可能還沒發揮會較耗電\n\n:
*The first charge may take longer time  
*Battery performance may not be optimal in the first few days, causing higher power consumption
translations.- By default, when installing an app tha:
- By default, when installing an app that supports Apple Watch, the app will also be installed on the Apple Watch (you can disable this in the iPhone's "Watch" app -> "My Watch" tab -> "General" -> turn off "Automatic App Install").

- Can I install only the Apple Watch app?  
  No, currently you cannot install an Apple Watch app independently; there must always be a corresponding app on the iPhone.

- Don't want to install the Apple Watch version of the app  
  Go to the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> scroll down to the "Installed on Apple Watch" section -> tap it -> turn off "Show App on Apple Watch"

- **Supporting "complex functions" in an app means supporting watch face complications**
translations.- Fully charged at midnight and removed,:
- Fully charged at midnight and removed, about 95% remained by 8 AM the next morning.

- Fully charged at midnight and taken off, **switched to Airplane Mode**, about 98% remained by 8 AM the next morning.
translations.- If the app does not appear in this lis:
- If the app does not appear in this list, it means the app's notifications are not enabled on the iPhone (please go to "Settings" -> "Notifications" on your iPhone and enable notifications for that app).

- Why do some notifications have sounds/vibrations while others don’t?  
  This setting depends on the notification settings of the app on your iPhone. If the app’s “Notifications” have “Sounds” enabled, you will get sound and vibration alerts.

- Most app notifications only support viewing, while some allow interactions (e.g., Line notifications can be replied to directly on the watch).

- **New notification alerts on the watch only when the phone is not in use and the watch is worn / The phone will not ring but notifications still appear in the notification center; this prevents both the phone and watch from ringing simultaneously**
translations.- The phone still makes sounds even when:
- The phone still makes sounds even when in silent or Do Not Disturb mode

- Pressing the icon firmly on the phone will trigger both a sound and the flashlight.
translations.1. Aluminum case + glass surface that ma:
1. Aluminum case + glass surface that may scratch + GPS = $12,900 (40mm) / $13,900 (44mm)

2. Aluminum case + potentially scratchable glass surface + GPS + cellular = $16,500 (40mm) / $17,500 (44mm)

3. Stainless steel case + sapphire crystal glass + GPS + cellular = $22,900 (40mm) / $24,900 (44mm)
translations.1. Currently, Spotify does not support o:
1. Currently, Spotify does not support offline playback, so you still need to bring your phone to listen to music while exercising (2018/11/21)  
   p.s. Apple Music and KKBOX support offline playback, so they don't have this issue.

2. Apple Watch apps are limited, and the main functions are making calls, replying to messages, replying on Line, replying on Fb Messenger, and Apple Pay—nothing more.  
   *Apple Pay can be used offline without the cellular version.

3. Cellular service requires a separate subscription and a monthly fee of $199 (Chunghwa/~$149 promotional price before 2018/12/31). Data usage counts toward your existing phone plan.

4. The cellular network works by the watch sending data through the carrier to the phone, which then transmits it out. Therefore, **your phone must be turned on for the watch to work.**  
   ***So if your phone is dead or powered off, the watch won't work even if it has cellular service.***
translations.1. Make sure your iPhone, Apple Watch, a:
1. Make sure your iPhone, Apple Watch, and Mac are all signed in with the same Apple ID.

2. Make sure your Apple ID has [Two-Factor Authentication](https://support.apple.com/zh-tw/HT205075){:target="_blank"} enabled.

3. Once the system detects your Apple account has an Apple Watch device, it will add a new option under "System Preferences" -> "Security & Privacy" -> "General" -> "Allow Apple Watch to unlock your Mac" -> just check the box.
translations.1. Press the Digital Crown to switch bet:
1. Press the Digital Crown to switch between the Home screen and the watch face.

2. Double-click the Digital Crown to switch to the most recently opened app.

3. Tap the side button to open the Dock (multitasking view). You can set it to show recent apps or your favorites (open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> Dock -> Dock layout).

4. Double-click the side button to bring up Apple Pay and make a payment immediately.  
   p.s. To change the default Apple Pay card, open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> Wallet & Apple Pay -> Transaction Defaults -> Default Card -> Select your preferred card.  
   * You cannot reorder cards; only one can be set as the default to appear first.

5. Press and hold the side button to open the system menu for "Power Off," "Power On," show Medical ID, or make an SOS emergency call.
translations.1. Stand (Blue): Achieved once if standi: 1. Stand (Blue): Achieved once by standing for 1 minute each hour
translations.1. Track workout data and heart rate sta:
1. Track workout data and heart rate status

2. Run without wanting to carry a phone

3. Reduce phone usage time without missing important notifications

4. When carrying many bags, use Apple Pay without taking out your phone

5. Automatically unlock MacBook (My MacBook Pro is the non-Touch Bar version, typing the password is tiring)

6. Use navigation while cycling

7. Cool! Never used one before, want to buy it just for fun

8. Want to develop a WatchOS app
translations.1. Work Requirements (Developing iOS App:
1. Work Requirements (Developing iOS Apps Requires macOS Devices)

2. Work Efficiency (improved stability, smoother app switching, and better operation experience, combined with seamless integration and data synchronization between the iPhone and macOS ecosystem, simplifies many tasks)

3. Battery Life, Portability, Retina Display
translations.1. [在意空氣](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/ap: 1. [Air Matters](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app/%E5%9C%A8%E6%84%8F%E7%A9%BA%E6%B0%A3/id477700080?mt=8){:target="_blank"} (Free): Supports watch face complication with AQI information
translations.1.滿版貼做家事時撞到破了換了一次(吐血)\n2.增購了一副皮製錶帶：\n\n:
1. The full-coverage screen protector cracked once after bumping it while doing housework (so frustrating).  
2. Purchased an additional leather watch band:
translations.1.雖然本體較重（運動時可能會感覺到）但在生活上更容易與穿搭配合，皮革錶帶或金屬: 1. Although the body is heavier (which may be noticeable during exercise), it is easier to match with outfits in daily life. Leather or metal bands paired with the unpolished body create a more consistent and stylish look with business attire. Switching to sport bands for casual or workout occasions still maintains elegance, offering both active and calm styles!
translations.2. [秒速記帳](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/ap: 2. [1 Second Money](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app/%E7%A7%92%E9%80%9F%E8%A8%98%E5%B8%B3-1secmoney/id926076608?mt=8){:target="_blank"} ($60): A fast expense tracking app that supports watch face complications. I tried this and C*Money, but C*Money costs $120 and has a too complex interface, which I found hard to use. So I personally recommend this one.
translations.2. 運動(綠)：超越快走強度的活動時間才會被計算\n\n: 2. Exercise (Green): Only activities exceeding the intensity of brisk walking will be counted
translations.2.藍寶石硬邦邦玻璃不必費神擔心錶面刮傷（個人使用經驗：我的上一隻 iPhone: 2. The sapphire crystal glass is very hard, so you don't need to worry about scratches on the watch face. (Personal experience: My previous iPhone 6 was used without a case for over a year; I didn't treat it specially, just kept it in my pocket or on the table daily. The screen got scratched badly, but the lens part with sapphire crystal glass remained intact.)
translations.3. [Bus+](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/ap: 3. [Bus+](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app/bus-%E5%85%A8%E5%8F%B0%E5%85%AC%E8%BB%8A%E5%8B%95%E6%85%8B-ubike-%E6%9F%A5%E8%A9%A2/id967861325?mt=8){:target="_blank"} (Free): Used to check bus information. I originally used Taipei Bus, but it doesn’t support Apple Watch, so I had to give it up. Bus+ works differently from Taipei Bus; it is station-based. My personal setup is to categorize frequently used locations (home/work/MRT station) and add bus routes that pass through these stations.
translations.3.活動(紅)：燃燒的動態卡路里數，有在動就會增加\n\n: 3. Activity (Red): The number of active calories burned, increases when you are moving
translations.3.錶殼部分不鏽鋼較耐撞、刮傷可重新拋光，看同事的不鏽鋼版本完好如初沒任何刮傷；: 3. The stainless steel case is more resistant to impacts and scratches, and can be polished to restore its look. I’ve seen a colleague’s stainless steel version still in perfect condition without any scratches. I’m not too concerned about the case, but if you really care, you might consider using a protective film (?
translations.5. [Shazam](https://itunes.apple.com/us/: 5. [Shazam](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/shazam/id284993459?mt=8){:target="_blank"} (Free): Tap to identify music (though you can also ask Siri directly). There's another app called SoundHound, but in my experience, Shazam is faster.
translations.6. [雙北市Ubike+](https://itunes.apple.com/: 6. [Taipei & New Taipei City Ubike+](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/%E9%9B%99%E5%8C%97%E5%B8%82ubike/id1439405152?mt=8){:target="_blank"} (Free): Check nearby or favorite Ubike stations for available bikes and parking spots.
translations.7. [錄音機](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app: 7. [Voice Recorder](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app/%E7%B0%A1%E7%B4%84%E9%8C%84%E9%9F%B3%E6%A9%9F-%E9%8C%84%E9%9F%B3%E7%A8%8B%E5%BC%8F/id1177522900?mt=8){:target="_blank"} (Free): Quickly record on Apple Watch and transfer to phone
translations.8. [倒數日](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app: 8. [Countdown Days](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app/%E5%80%92%E6%95%B8%E6%97%A5-days-matter/id406170251?mt=8){:target="_blank"} (Free): View countdowns to anniversaries or upcoming events
translations.9. [Advanced Calculator For Apple Watch: 9. [Advanced Calculator For Apple Watch OS](https://itunes.apple.com/tw/app/advanced-calculator-for-apple-watch-os/id986568900?mt=8){:target="_blank"} (Free): Use a mini calculator on Apple Watch
translations.> It is recommended to use at least a bu: > It is recommended to use at least a bumper case; any brand is fine.
translations.> My hard-learned lesson can be summed u: > My hard-learned lesson can be summed up in one phrase: I wish I had known about protective cases earlier. I wouldn’t have wasted money!
translations.Apple Watch APP不多，能做的事也只有打電話/回訊息/回Line/回:
Apple Watch apps are limited, and the main functions are making calls, replying to messages, replying on Line, replying on Fb Messenger, and Apple Pay—nothing more.  
*Apple Pay can be used offline without the cellular version.
translations.Apple Watch 打開 「相機」這時手機的相機也會打開，就能用手錶控制手機: Apple Watch opens the "Camera," and the phone's camera will also turn on. You can use the watch to control the phone's camera for taking photos and recording videos. Press firmly to switch lenses or adjust camera settings.
translations.[**[2020–10–24 更新]** ：Spotify 已支援獨立播放，在手: [**[2020–10–24 Update]**: Spotify now supports standalone playback. In the watch Spotify app, select Playback Device -> Apple Watch -> connect Bluetooth headphones -> then you can play! (Offline downloads are still not supported, so an internet connection is required).](../eab0e984043/)
translations.[2019–05–02更新]：更上一層的Siri體驗？請參考 [AirPods: [2019–05–02 Update]: A next-level Siri experience? Please refer to the Siri section in [AirPods 2 Unboxing and First Impressions](../33afa0ae557d/). With AirPods 2, you can use Siri directly just by wearing the earbuds, no need to raise your wrist.
translations.[2019–05–02更新]：蘋果全家桶的設備再添一項， [AirPods 2: [2019–05–02 Update]: Another device added to the Apple ecosystem, [AirPods 2 (unboxing and hands-on experience here)](../33afa0ae557d/)
translations.p.s 反過來手機要找手錶則無此功能，若是遺失要找請從「尋找iPhone」中尋找: p.s. The reverse—using the phone to find the watch—is not available. If lost, please use the "Find iPhone" app to locate it.
translations.p.s 我公司的Mac Mini就是一直無法啟用，重啟之後就正常了\n\n: p.s My company's Mac Mini could never activate properly, but it works fine after a restart.
translations.「Digital Crown」= 「數位錶冠」\n「Side Button」=: 請提供您需要翻譯的 Markdown 文章段落內容，我會依照您的指示進行翻譯。
translations.「劇院模式」- 抬手不會喚醒螢幕，要點擊螢幕才會喚醒\n\n: "Theater Mode" - Raising your wrist won't wake the screen; you need to tap the screen to wake it up.
translations.「水中鎖定」- 螢幕觸控鎖定，要轉動數位錶冠後才能解鎖，解鎖後揚聲器會自動播放聲: "Water Lock" – Locks the touchscreen; you need to turn the Digital Crown to unlock. After unlocking, the speaker will automatically play sounds to expel water.
translations.「省電模式」- 真的很省電！只剩下按數位錶冠顯示時間功能，其他完全關閉，幾乎等於: "Power Saving Mode" – Really saves battery! Only the digital crown press shows the time; all other functions are completely off, almost like the watch is powered down. To exit power saving mode, press and hold the side button (same as powering on).
translations.「靜音模式」- 所有通知都靜音、都不震動、不亮螢幕提示，僅顯示在通知中心\n\n: "Silent Mode" - All notifications are muted, no vibrations, no screen wake-up alerts, only shown in the Notification Center
translations.「飛航模式」- 關閉所有外部連線\n\n: "Airplane Mode" - Turn off all external connections
translations.一整天下來約配戴15小時，沒刻意一直玩的話大約剩下65%電量，很能撐，勉強可以兩: Worn for about 15 hours throughout the day, with no constant use, it still has around 65% battery left. It lasts well and can barely make it two days on a single charge.
translations.上週(2018/11/11)實際跑了一趟101沒有我要的貨，於是從網路下單由大陸: Last week (2018/11/11), I went to 101 but couldn't find the item I wanted. So I ordered online from Mainland China. Ordered on 11/11, shipped on 11/12, and delivered on 11/15 as scheduled:
translations.不想安裝Apple Watch版的APP\n從「iPhone」上的「Watch」:
Don't want to install the Apple Watch version of the app  
Go to the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> scroll down to the "Installed on Apple Watch" section -> tap it -> turn off "Show App on Apple Watch"
translations.不鏽鋼版本 (感謝同事友情支援)\n\n: Stainless Steel Version (Thanks to a colleague for the kind support)
translations.不鏽鋼錶殼+藍寶石硬邦邦玻璃+GPS+行動網路 = $22,900(40mm): Stainless steel case + sapphire crystal glass + GPS + cellular = $22,900 (40mm) / $24,900 (44mm)
translations.以上所有模式，鬧鐘、倒數功能皆會照樣響「省電模式下會強制開機」\n\n: All the above modes, including alarm and countdown, will still sound as usual. "Low Power Mode will force the device to turn on."
translations.但我買的是一般版本…如果你上網搜尋Apple Watch貼膜的文章會找到兩派的人:
But I bought the standard version... If you search online for articles about Apple Watch screen protectors, you'll find two camps: one supports using protectors because the screen can get scratched; the other opposes it, believing scratches depend on usage habits, the screen isn’t that fragile, and asking, "Have you ever seen a Rolex with a screen protector?"  
Or if you’re a laid-back user who buys it to use it as is, considering it a consumable product, then this isn’t a concern.
translations.你沒看錯，Apple Watch也有手電筒；在錶面頁由底部上拉出選單找到「手電筒: You read that right, Apple Watch also has a flashlight; swipe up from the bottom on the watch face to open the control center and find the "Flashlight" icon. Once inside, you can swipe left or right to change the screen color; yes, it’s just a bright screen color!
translations.佩戴至今快滿兩週，從原本很新奇的心情到現在已經平淡地融入到生活；到目前為止對生活: Wearing it for almost two weeks now, what started as a novelty has smoothly integrated into daily life. So far, the noticeable benefits are: unlocking my Mac without typing long passwords (company policy requires logging out when leaving the desk), checking the weather instantly, viewing navigation, receiving app notifications, and monitoring heart rate for health—basically just these. The supported apps and features are quite limited.
translations.使用手機的時間有減少？沒有特別感覺 ，因為收到通知我還是習慣用手機回，手錶回要用: Has my phone usage decreased? Not really, because when I get notifications, I still prefer to reply on my phone. Replying via the watch requires voice input, which is awkward in public, and handwriting is very slow. Also, many apps do not support Apple Watch.
translations.保護貼很容易碎邊，我在沒有保護殼(套)的狀態下，平均貼不到一個月就會不知道怎麼的: Screen protectors chip easily. Without a case, the edges usually chip within a month for some unknown reason. Each protector costs $990… I’ve replaced three so far, which is quite frustrating. Since using a case, it’s been 4 months and the protector is still intact!
translations.內建的AQI似乎不支援台灣地區，要去「App Store」搜尋「在意空氣」下載安: The built-in AQI does not seem to support Taiwan. You need to search for "在意空氣" in the App Store, download and open it. Then, go to the watch face customization section and select "在意空氣" for the complication.
translations.其他項目就等大家自行體會囉\n\n: Other features are left for everyone to discover on their own.
translations.動輒$12,900起跳真的值得嗎？破萬的手錶有更多很好的選擇，但要連動頻果全家桶: Starting at $12,900, is it really worth it? There are many great watches over ten thousand, but only one that integrates with the entire Apple ecosystem. If you just want a luxury watch, there’s no need to use an Apple Watch. If you want a watch that helps with daily tasks, it’s worth considering. If you want luxury plus daily functionality, consider the stainless steel or even the Hermès version!
translations.另一方法是，打開「iPhone」->「設定」->「一般」->「鍵盤」->「聽寫」: Another method is to open "iPhone" -> "Settings" -> "General" -> "Keyboard" -> "Dictation" -> "Dictation Languages" -> select only "Mandarin".
translations.只要抬起手腕，螢幕點亮後，可以直接說話使用Siri!，不用說「Hey! Siri:
Simply raise your wrist to light up the screen and start speaking to use Siri! No need to say "Hey Siri" (e.g., after raising your wrist, just say **"What's the weather tomorrow?"**).  
You can also use Siri when your phone is a bit far from you (e.g., while hanging clothes).
translations.在Apple Watch上同時按下數位錶冠和側邊按鈕，螢幕出現光影掠過效果後即表: Press the Digital Crown and the side button on the Apple Watch at the same time. When the screen flashes, the screenshot is taken. You can then open your iPhone to view the screenshot!
translations.在訊息中重壓「麥克風」或「手寫」Icon 呼出選單>「選擇語言」->「中文」\n: Press and hold the "Microphone" or "Handwriting" icon in the message to open the menu > "Select Language" -> "Chinese"
translations.在錶面頁由底部上拉出選單找到一個「手機在震動的Icon」點擊後手機就會發出聲響！: On the watch face screen, swipe up from the bottom to open the menu and find the "phone vibrating icon." Tap it, and your phone will make a sound!
translations.大包小包的時候能不用掏出手機/使用Apple Pay\n: When carrying many bags, you can use Apple Pay without taking out your phone
translations.大部分的APP通知都只支援查看，部分可支援操作（如Line的通知可點擊在手錶上回: Most app notifications only support viewing, while some allow interactions (e.g., Line notifications can be replied to directly on the watch).
translations.如果一時找不到東西比較，可以拿一個日拋隱形眼鏡的匣子作比較約=44mm (實際測: If you can't find something to compare with, you can use a daily disposable contact lens case, which is about 44mm (actually measured 44.5mm).
translations.如果你也要貼膜，在這裡給你個建議「多花點錢找人貼」，一般我的手機都是自己貼的，為: If you also want to apply a screen protector, here’s a tip: "Spend a bit more to have someone else apply it." I usually apply screen protectors on my phone myself, so why do I say you should get someone else to do it for the Apple Watch?
translations.實際使用感想：Apple Map的地標很少難搜尋、好像只會導大路，明明有雙線道、: Actual Usage Impressions: Apple Maps has few landmarks, making it hard to search. It seems to only guide you on main roads, ignoring faster, less congested dual-lane routes. So I’m still hoping for Google Maps updates. For now, I’m just making do with this.
translations.實際與同事的Apple Watch S3相比，S4 開啟APP幾乎不用Loadi:
Compared to a colleague's Apple Watch S3, the S4 opens apps almost instantly with no loading, and it boots up very quickly.  
You can check the actual test in this video: [【最新】4代 Apple Watch Series 4 速度實測 音量比較](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2p1bJjOiUUs){:target="_blank"}
translations.工作效率（穩定度或程式切換、操作方式體驗都更好再配合生態系iPhone與MacO: Work efficiency (improved stability, smoother app switching, and better operation experience, combined with seamless integration and data synchronization between the iPhone and MacOS ecosystem, simplifies many tasks)
translations.工作需要（開發iOS APP一定要有MacOS設備）\n: Work Requirements (Developing iOS Apps Requires macOS Devices)
translations.左44mm/右40mm (感謝同事友情支援)\n\n: Left 44mm / Right 40mm (Thanks to my colleague for the kind support)
translations.左邊表示連線中斷中，右邊表示連線正常中\n\n: The left side indicates a disconnected status, while the right side indicates a connected status.
translations.建議「至少要用邊框保護套」哪一牌子都可\n\n: It is recommended to use at least a bumper case, any brand is fine.
translations.很重要，所以放第一個，怎麼截Apple Watch的螢幕圖：\n打開「iPhon:
Very important, so placed first: How to take a screenshot on Apple Watch:  
Open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> go to "General" -> turn on "Enable Screenshots"
translations.想寫 WatchOS APP\n: Want to Develop a WatchOS App
translations.我個人是買 **2. 鋁金屬錶殼+可能會刮傷的玻璃表面+GPS+行動網路 44: I personally bought **2. Aluminum case + glass surface that may scratch + GPS + cellular 44 mm**
translations.我個人有點強迫症有刮傷會不爽，所以支持要貼膜；使用習慣問題? 我覺得只有撞到才是: I’m a bit obsessive about scratches, so I support using a screen protector. Is it a usage habit issue? I think only impacts count as bad habits; daily dust damage is really hard to avoid.
translations.我的血淚教訓只想說一句相見恨晚，早知道有保護套這種產品就不用多花冤望錢！\n\n: My hard-learned lesson can be summed up in one phrase: I wish I had known about protective cases earlier. I wouldn’t have wasted money!
translations.我的配戴時間只有起床～洗澡前，睡覺不戴（床靠牆怕無意識時敲到牆壁），洗澡前拆下來: I only wear it from waking up until before showering. I don’t wear it to bed (worried about accidentally hitting the wall since my bed is against it). I take it off to charge before showering.
translations.所以預算充足的朋友還是建議升不銹鋼版本．\n\n: So for those with a sufficient budget, I still recommend upgrading to the stainless steel version.
translations.手機在靜音、無擾狀態下依然會發出聲響\n: The phone still makes sounds even when on silent or Do Not Disturb mode
translations.手錶內建揚聲器只能通話時使用、播放提示音不能播放音樂；如果覺得用手錶講電話大家都: The built-in speaker on the watch can only be used for calls and playing notification sounds; it cannot play music. If you feel uncomfortable talking on the watch because others can hear, you can use Bluetooth headphones.
translations.手錶在手機附近時使用藍牙，距離太遠時使用WiFi\n\n: When the watch is near the phone, it uses Bluetooth; when the distance is too far, it uses WiFi.
translations.手錶預設會吃iPhone上APP的通知設定，也可特別關閉某些APP的通知不要傳送: By default, the watch follows the notification settings of the iPhone apps. You can also specifically disable notifications from certain apps on the watch (open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> "Notifications" -> scroll to the bottom to adjust settings for each app).
translations.打開「iPhone」上的「Watch」 APP ->「我的手錶」頁->呼吸->關: Open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> Breathe -> Turn off Breathe reminders
translations.打開「iPhone」上的「Watch」 APP ->「我的手錶」頁->密碼->簡: Open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> Passcode -> Simple Passcode -> Turn off -> Then you can set a 6-digit passcode
translations.打開「iPhone」上的「Watch」 APP ->「我的手錶」頁->活動紀錄-: Open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> Activity -> Turn off Stand Reminders
translations.拿到的時候很興奮直接拆開來用就沒做記錄了，開箱部分可參考網路： [Apple W: I was so excited to start using it right away that I didn’t document the unboxing. For the unboxing, you can refer to these online videos: [Apple Watch Series 4 Experience Full-Screen Watch, Is It You?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mXIEOhI-buM){:target="_blank"} [(Mainland China)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mXIEOhI-buM){:target="_blank"}, [Apple Watch Series 4 Complete Unboxing! Three Features Are Really Impressive](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hErwMkypEqc){:target="_blank"} [(Taiwan)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hErwMkypEqc){:target="_blank"}
translations.晚上12點充滿電拆下放著， **切換飛航模式** ，隔天早上8點大約剩下98%\: Fully charged at midnight and taken off, **switched to Airplane Mode**, about 98% left at 8 AM the next morning.
translations.晚上12點充滿電拆下放著，隔天早上8點大約剩下95%\n: Fully charged at midnight and removed, by 8 AM the next morning about 95% remained.
translations.最後花了$990給人家貼好(x豪包膜) h*a果凍膠玻璃貼，密合、沒氣泡、滿版、: Finally spent $990 to have it professionally applied (x Luxury Film) h*a jelly gel glass screen protector—perfect fit, no bubbles, full coverage, oleophobic and hydrophobic.
translations.有40mm/44mm兩種，實際依照個人手腕大小做選擇，太大可能會不合手、心率偵測: There are two sizes: 40mm and 44mm. Choose based on your wrist size. Too large may feel uncomfortable and affect heart rate accuracy; too small may look odd when worn.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有鋁金屬錶殼+可能會刮傷的玻璃表面 和 不鏽鋼錶殼+藍寶石硬邦邦玻璃 兩種，預算: There are two options: aluminum case with a glass surface that may scratch, and stainless steel case with a hard sapphire crystal glass. If your budget allows, I definitely recommend choosing the latter. Personally, I chose the former due to budget constraints. So why choose the stainless steel case with sapphire crystal glass version?
translations.每日達成紀錄會提示，另外可在Apple Watch上的「活動紀錄」APP重壓調整: Daily achievement reminders will notify you. You can also press firmly on the "Activity" app on Apple Watch to adjust your activity goal (the default is 360 calories per day).
translations.比較特別的是還有一個爆閃模式：\n\n: A special feature is the Flash Mode:
translations.活動紀錄每日有三個圈圈三個目標：\n\n: Activity records have three rings and three daily goals:
translations.減少使用手機的時間，但又不想露接重要資訊\n: Reduce phone usage time without missing important information
translations.潮！沒用過，想買來玩玩\n: Cool! Never used one before, want to buy it just for fun.
translations.為什麼有的通知會有提示音/震動有的不會？\n這項設定是吃iPhone上APP的通:
Why do some notifications have sounds/vibrations while others don’t?  
This setting depends on the notification settings of the app on your iPhone. If the app’s “Notifications” have “Sounds” enabled, you will get sound and vibration alerts.
translations.為什麼要買？好用嗎？哪裡好用？怎麼用？& WatchOS APP推薦\n\n: Why Buy? Is It Useful? What’s Good About It? How to Use It? & WatchOS App Recommendations
translations.目前Spotify不支援離線播放，運動聽音樂還是要帶手機 (2018/11/21:
Currently, Spotify does not support offline playback, so you still need to bring your phone to listen to music while exercising (2018/11/21)  
p.s. Apple Music/KKBOX support offline playback, so they don't have this issue
translations.目前僅支援Apple Map，Google Map暫時不支援，打開「地圖」搜尋或: Currently, only Apple Maps is supported; Google Maps is not supported yet. Open "Maps" to search or select your home or company address set in your personal info (source: Contacts -> My Card), or enter a destination manually. After starting navigation, each turn is shown as a card that automatically flips based on your movement. You can rotate to view, tap to see the map details, and when you are 40 meters away, it will vibrate to alert you. Press firmly to end navigation.
translations.確認你的Apple帳號有開啟 [雙重認證](https://support.ap: Make sure your Apple ID has [Two-Factor Authentication](https://support.apple.com/zh-tw/HT205075){:target="_blank"} enabled.
translations.確認你的iPhone/Apple Watch/Mac電腦登入的是同個Apple帳: Make sure your iPhone, Apple Watch, and Mac are all signed in with the same Apple ID.
translations.站立(藍)：每一小時有站立1分鐘就算達成1次\n: Stand (Blue): Achieved once if standing for 1 minute each hour
translations.第二次嘗試是買g*r軟膜($100/兩片)全膠能密合，但軟的很難貼容易有氣泡；兩: The second attempt was buying g*r soft film ($100 for two pieces). It is fully adhesive and fits well, but being soft makes it hard to apply and prone to bubbles. Both pieces had some visible bubbles, which was annoying, and it’s not oleophobic or hydrophobic, making it less smooth to use.
translations.系統在檢測到你的Apple帳號有Apple Watch裝置之後就會在「系統偏好設: Once the system detects your Apple account has an Apple Watch device, it will add a new option under "System Preferences" -> "Security & Privacy" -> "General" -> "Allow Apple Watch to unlock your Mac" -> just check the box.
translations.綜合以上因素開始挑選適合的Apple Watch；撇除錶帶材質，單論本體有三種版: Considering all the above factors, start choosing the right Apple Watch; excluding the strap material, there are three versions of the watch body to choose from:
translations.能不能只安裝Apple Watch APP？\n不行，目前無法獨立安裝Apple:
Can I install only the Apple Watch app?  
No, currently you cannot install an Apple Watch app independently; there must always be a corresponding app on the iPhone.
translations.若APP沒在此列表出現則表示該APP本來就沒在iPhone上開啟通知功能（請去「: If the app does not appear in this list, it means the app's notifications are not enabled on the iPhone (please go to "Settings" -> "Notifications" on your iPhone and enable notifications for that app).
translations.若一直啟用失敗，請先確認你的Apple帳號有開啟雙重認證(非 [雙步認證](ht: If activation keeps failing, please first make sure your Apple account has Two-Factor Authentication enabled (not [Two-Step Verification](https://support.apple.com/zh-tw/HT207198){:target="_blank"}) or try restarting your computer!
translations.行動網路使用需額外申辦並繳交每個月$199電信費(中華/~2018/12/31前: Cellular service requires a separate subscription and a monthly fee of $199 (Chunghwa/~$149 promotional price before 2018/12/31). Data usage counts toward your existing phone plan.
translations.行動網路的運作方式是手錶將資料透過電信傳輸到手機再透過手機發送出去，因此你的 *:
The cellular network works by the watch sending data through the carrier to the phone, which then transmits it out. Therefore, **your phone must be turned on for the watch to work.**  
***So if your phone is dead or powered off, the watch won't work even if it has cellular service.***
translations.覺得這是Bug…\n\n: I think this is a bug...
translations.記錄運動情況、心率狀況\n: Track workout data and heart rate status
translations.詳細可查看iPhone上「健康」APP有詳細解說。\n\n: For more details, you can check the "Health" app on your iPhone for a thorough explanation.
translations.請看 [動手做一支 Apple Watch App 吧！(Swift)](../: Please see [Build an Apple Watch App! (Swift)](../e85d77b05061/)
translations.請看 [智慧家居初體驗 — Apple HomeKit & 小米米家](../c: Please see [Smart Home First Experience — Apple HomeKit & Xiaomi Mijia](../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.請看下一篇&gt;&gt; [AirPods 2 開箱及上手體驗心得](../3: Next article >> [AirPods 2 Unboxing and First Impressions](../33afa0ae557d/)
translations.貼膜後的手感當然不比原生好（個人感覺大約 97分:100分）而且螢幕會高一小截: The feel after applying the screen protector is naturally not as good as the original (personally about 97 out of 100), and the screen will be slightly raised. Whether to accept this trade-off depends on personal preference!
translations.購買至今曾經有想退掉的念頭，總覺得$17,500能做很多事，花在一隻手錶上好像不: Since buying it, I have thought about returning it. I feel like $17,500 can be spent on many things, and spending that much on a watch doesn’t seem very worthwhile. However, it does help with daily life. Is that help worth $17,500? I don’t think so at the moment. I’ll reassess when the Apple Watch app ecosystem grows bigger. For now, it’s a luxury item XD—I bought it because it’s cool, trendy, and impulsive.
translations.跑步不想帶手機\n: Running without wanting to bring a phone
translations.這樣你的語音輸入就只聽得懂國語了，手機部分一併受到影響\n\n: This way, your voice input will only recognize Mandarin, and the phone will also be affected.
translations.這裡附上筆者的手給大家參考，若還是不確定大小最好還是跑一趟101門市去試戴看看（: Here is a photo of my hand for reference. If you're still unsure about the size, it's best to visit the 101 store to try it on (I initially aimed for the 40mm, but after trying it on, I found it too small…).
translations.這部分只是把你手機的Apple Map資訊傳到手錶上（手錶導航時手機的導航也會自: This part simply sends your phone's Apple Maps information to the watch (when navigating on the watch, the phone's navigation will automatically start as well).
translations.這部分我持保留態度；個人是有買行動網路版本，以後跑步運動就不用帶手機另外考量到要:
I am somewhat reserved on this; I personally bought the cellular version so I don’t have to bring my phone when running or exercising. Considering I plan to wear it for 2–3 years and am unsure about the future, I upgraded. But if your budget is tight and you won’t leave home without your phone, the WiFi-only version is fine (a $3600 price difference).  
Please consider the following points:
translations.這部分搞得我心很累，首先我在Pchome買東京*用的玻璃鋼化保護貼來貼($399: This part really exhausted me. First, I bought a tempered glass screen protector for Tokyo use from Pchome ($399). It’s a hard film with adhesive only on the edges. After applying, the center had a hollow gap and didn’t fit well, making the touch extremely unresponsive (I seriously doubt if the manufacturer tested it at all). So I removed it shortly after applying;
translations.配對、基礎設定這裡就不再贅述，可參考上面開箱文；這裡假定你已經都弄好開始使用Ap: Pairing and basic setup will not be repeated here; please refer to the unboxing article above. This assumes you have already completed the setup and started using the Apple Watch.
translations.重壓Icon手機除了發出聲響之外還會發出閃光燈\n: Pressing the icon hard on the phone will trigger both a sound and the flashlight.
translations.鋁金屬錶殼+可能會刮傷的玻璃表面+GPS = $12,900(40mm) / $: Aluminum case + glass surface that may scratch + GPS = $12,900 (40mm) / $13,900 (44mm)
translations.鋁金屬錶殼+可能會刮傷的玻璃表面+GPS+行動網路 = $16,500(40mm: Aluminum case + potentially scratchable glass surface + GPS + cellular = $16,500 (40mm) / $17,500 (44mm)
translations.長壓側邊按鈕呼出系統選單「關閉電源」或「開機」、顯示醫療卡、播打SOS緊急電話\: Press and hold the side button to bring up the system menu for "Power Off," "Power On," display Medical ID, or make an SOS emergency call.
translations.隨便你玩隨便你放，你覺得哪些資訊重要或怎樣設計比較美都看個人；我是把「我隨時看手: Put whatever you want and arrange it however you like; which information is important or what design looks better is up to personal preference. I put the information I want to see anytime on the watch face, and you can also add multiple watch faces for switching.
translations.靠近自動解鎖MacBook（我的MacBook Pro非Touch Bar版本，: Approach to automatically unlock MacBook (My MacBook Pro is the non-Touch Bar version, typing the password is tiring)
translations.預設在安裝APP時該APP有支援For Apple Watch的APP時也會一併: By default, when installing an app that supports Apple Watch, the app will also be installed on the Apple Watch (you can disable this in the iPhone's "Watch" app -> "My Watch" tab -> "General" -> turn off "Automatic App Install").
translations.預設顯示iPhone上喜愛的項目，打開iPhone的「相片」在想要傳到手錶上的相: By default, it shows your favorite items from the iPhone. Open the iPhone "Photos" app and tap the "heart" on the photos you want to sync to the watch.
translations.首先自述一下個人使用蘋果產品的背景，我並非忠實果粉；第一次接觸是在 2015 年: First, a brief background on my use of Apple products: I am not a loyal Apple fan. My first contact was in 2015 when I used my part-time job salary to buy an iPhone 6. Due to work needs, I only started using MacOS computers (Mac Mini) last year and purchased my own MacBook Pro and upgraded to an iPhone 8 this year. The reasons I entered the Apple ecosystem are mainly:
translations.體能訓練部分跑步我是使用Nike Run Club +沒使用內建的，上週去騎腳踏: For fitness training, I use Nike Run Club for running instead of the built-in app. Last week, I tried the built-in workout for cycling -> "Outdoor Cycle" to record my ride. It tracks elevation, distance, time, route, and heart rate. Awesome!
translations.點一下側邊按鈕呼出Dock (多工視窗)，可設定顯示最近開啟的APP或自訂喜好的: Tap the side button to bring up the Dock (multitasking view). You can set it to show recently used apps or your favorite apps (open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> Dock -> Dock layout).
translations.點一下數位錶冠在主畫面與錶面之間切換\n: Press the Digital Crown to switch between the Home screen and the watch face.
translations.點兩下側邊按鈕呼出Apple Pay，這時感應就會直接付款\np.s Apple:
Double-click the side button to bring up Apple Pay, and it will immediately make a payment.  
p.s. To change the default Apple Pay card, open the "Watch" app on your iPhone -> "My Watch" tab -> Wallet & Apple Pay -> Transaction Defaults -> Default Card -> Select your preferred default card.  
* You cannot change the card order, only set one card as the default to appear first.
translations.點兩下數位錶冠切換到最近開啟的APP\n: Double-click the Digital Crown to switch to the most recently opened app.
